title: BOBCASE
description: Plugin for opening crates with various prizes in Minecraft.
body:
🔧 BOBCASE - Crate Opening Plugin

Experimental & Free | Visually Enhanced Crate Opening

## 📌 Overview **BOBCASE** is a free, experimental crate-opening plugin that adds immersive and engaging reward mechanics to your Minecraft server. Discover two exciting crate systems: - 🎡 **Animated Spinning Crates** with smooth roulette-style animations - 🎯 **Scratch-to-Win Crates** featuring a fun match-2 reward mechanic This plugin is currently under active development. Features may change and bugs might be present. Your feedback is really important to me! Any suggestions, bug reports, or ideas help make this project better. Don’t hesitate to share your thoughts — together we can improve it! --- ## ✨ Features - Animated spinning crates with realistic roulette effect - Scratch-to-win crates with match-2 win logic - Smart and flexible reward selection system - Fully customizable drop settings per crate - Manage crate rewards easily in-game or via menu - Supports CustomModelData and rare/unique items --- ## 🎮 Player Commands | Command | Description | Permission | |-------------------|-------------------------------|-------------------| | `/bobcase` | Open the main crate GUI | `bobcase.admin` | | `/bobcase reload` | Reload plugin configuration | `bobcase.admin` | --- ## 📸 Screenshots / GIF

Click to expand preview images
